mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, real_name, phone AS mobile, email, avatar, status, industry_type, last_login_time, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.realName}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.mobile}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
AND 1 = 1
AND 1 = 1
AND industry_type = #{query.industryType}
ORDER BY created_time DESC
